name: AI Adoption Habit Tracker
description:
A retro-style companion that helps managers and colleagues practice micro-behaviors for AI Adoption through daily quests in a classic green-and-black terminal aesthetic.

The five core behaviours are creating psychological safety (tackling apathy and the resistant ai conversation), being a change leader (navigating ambiguity and commercial maturity), baseline AI fluency (personal confidence on foundational use, making you a more confident decision maker), orchestration (the science and art of enabling your team to innovate and utilise AI) and coaching capability.
